name: Marcus Chen
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Full stack developer comfortable across the entire web stack. Built and shipped 3 SaaS products from scratch. Thrives in fast-paced startup environments and takes full ownership of features from DB schema to UI.

highlights: Architected and launched a B2B invoicing platform from 0 to 1,200 paying customers
Designed PostgreSQL schema supporting multi-tenancy with row-level security
Set up Docker-based CI/CD on AWS, reducing release cycle from weekly to daily
Built RESTful API serving a 50k MAU project management tool
Introduced Redis caching layer cutting average API response time by 60%
Delivered 5 client projects including e-commerce stores and internal dashboards
Worked primarily with React, Node.js, and Firebase
